config:
seed: 42
device: auto
output_root: outputs

mesh:
  Lx: 10.0
  Ly: 5.0
  nx: 30
  ny: 15

mechanics:
  E0: 50.0
  nu: 0.3
  plane_stress: true
  stretch_x: 0.2
  kf_aniso: 0.25

time:
  dt: 0.2
  n_steps: 200

cells:
  n_agents: 80
  speed: 0.05
  persistence: 0.9
  noise_std: 0.08
  taxis_weight: 0.02
  dep_rate: 0.1
  dep_sigma: 0.35

remodeling:
  tau_fibre: 30.0
  k_align_collagen: 0.05
  k_deg: 0.01
  k_growth: 0.01

viz:
  frame_every: 2
  dpi: 120
  fps: 20
  quiver_stride: 3
